response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: they are overqualified, have minimal Java exposure (listed among many languages without project context), possess only basic German (a hard requirement), and their career trajectory suggests they are seeking senior/leadership roles, not an entry-level position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in agile practices, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
Demonstrated ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor others
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is required for client collaboration
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, mismatched for entry-level role
Java experience is minimal and not highlighted in any meaningful project context
